gene_region.label: APOE transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical APOE genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window used by this app to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval begins.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: APOE encodes apolipoprotein E, a lipid-transport protein central to cholesterol and triglyceride-rich lipoprotein handling and to brain lipid, amyloid, tau, and neuroinflammatory research.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local APOE bundle is lipid and neurogenetics oriented. APOE epsilon genotypes are risk modifiers rather than deterministic Alzheimer disease calls, and lipid/cardiovascular interpretation depends on full haplotype and phenotype context.
variant_effect_overview: The APOE epsilon2/epsilon3/epsilon4 isoforms are defined mainly by rs429358 and rs7412 combinations, so single-site interpretation is incomplete.
APOE variants modify cohort-level risk for Alzheimer disease, lipid traits, cardiovascular biology, and type III hyperlipoproteinemia context.
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: APOE methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a lipoprotein transport, cholesterol handling, remnant clearance, neuroinflammation, and amyloid/tau-associated brain lipid biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for APOE.
Because APOE biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against lipoprotein transport, cholesterol handling, remnant clearance, neuroinflammation, and amyloid/tau-associated brain lipid biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use APOE promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for lipoprotein transport, cholesterol handling, remnant clearance, neuroinflammation, and amyloid/tau-associated brain lipid biology.

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000130203: APOE coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: APOE biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: lipoprotein transport, cholesterol handling, remnant clearance, neuroinflammation, and amyloid/tau-associated brain lipid biology
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests an APOE lipid-transport and neurogenetics thesis: the individual may carry partial or complete epsilon haplotype context relevant to lipoprotein clearance, Alzheimer disease cohort risk, neuroinflammation, and cardiovascular lipid biology. Full APOE epsilon interpretation requires both rs429358 and rs7412 genotype dosage.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: rs429358 is curated as a APOE marker for Alzheimer disease risk-modifier research, Lipid transport and cardiovascular traits. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the lipoprotein transport, cholesterol handling, remnant clearance, neuroinflammation, and amyloid/tau-associated brain lipid biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag lipoprotein transport, cholesterol handling, remnant clearance, neuroinflammation, and amyloid/tau-associated brain lipid biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
research_context: Use this marker as a APOE pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair rs429358 with APOE methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.

literature_findings.genotypes: rs429358 or linked APOE locus genotype states
literature_findings.phenotype: Alzheimer disease risk-modifier research, Lipid transport and cardiovascular traits
literature_findings.finding: The local curation treats rs429358 as a gene-specific marker for Alzheimer disease risk-modifier research, Lipid transport and cardiovascular traits and lipoprotein transport, cholesterol handling, remnant clearance, neuroinflammation, and amyloid/tau-associated brain lipid biology.
